## ⚠️ Security Notice

> **If you suspect this is a security vulnerability** (e.g., key leakage, auth bypass, crypto flaw):
> 1. **Do NOT** describe details in this public issue
> 2. Email `security@me2em.com` immediately
> 3. See our [Security Policy](https://github.com/me2em-org/me2em-protocol/blob/main/SECURITY.md)

### ✅ Before Submitting

- [ ] I searched [existing issues](https://github.com/me2em-org/me2em-protocol/issues) and confirmed this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I tested with the latest version from `main` branch
- [ ] I included minimal reproducible steps (or a link to a repro repo)
- [ ] I redacted any sensitive data (seeds, private keys, tokens) from this report

> 🙏 Thank you for helping make Me2em more secure and reliable!
